title: Implement the generic OMO session-orchestrated runner
summary: Add repo-local runtime state, session reuse, Claude pause/resume, and top-level OMO supervisor commands for Homecook's workflow-v2 pilot.
goal: Turn the locked session-orchestrator spec into executable Homecook tooling without replacing existing slice governance.

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts tests/omo-session-orchestrator.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts

pnpm exec eslint scripts/lib/omo-lite-supervisor.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-runner.mjs scripts/lib/omo-session-runtime.mjs scripts/lib/omo-session-orchestrator.mjs scripts/omo-start.mjs scripts/omo-continue.mjs scripts/omo-resume-pending.mjs scripts/omo-status.mjs tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts tests/omo-session-orchestrator.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts tests/omo-session-orchestrator.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts

pnpm exec eslint scripts/lib/omo-lite-supervisor.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-runner.mjs scripts/lib/omo-session-runtime.mjs scripts/lib/omo-session-orchestrator.mjs scripts/omo-start.mjs scripts/omo-continue.mjs scripts/omo-resume-pending.mjs scripts/omo-status.mjs tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts tests/omo-session-orchestrator.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts

out_of_scope: Replacing current slice workflow governance with workflow-v2
Silent session recreation after session loss
open_questions: Whether start/continue should eventually infer stage prerequisites from PR and CI metadata instead of runtime stage counters
